prompts.abstract: The object is a vertical rod with a cylindrical section at the bottom and a rectangular section at the top. The rod has a uniform diameter throughout its length.
prompts.description: The object is a vertical rod with a cylindrical section at the bottom and a rectangular section at the top. The rod has a uniform diameter throughout its length.
prompts.beginner: The design features a vertical rod with a hollow cylindrical shape. The rod stands 0.75 units tall and has a consistent width and depth of about 0.0238 units. This simple yet effective design is ideal for applications requiring a lightweight and strong component.
prompts.intermediate: The part consists of a vertical rod with a cylindrical section. The rod has a consistent cross-sectional shape throughout its length. The overall dimensions of the rod are defined by its height, which is 0.75 units, and its width and depth, both measuring approximately 0.0238 units. The cross-section of the rod features an outer circular boundary and an inner circular boundary, creating a hollow cylindrical shape. This design ensures structural integrity while reducing material usage.
prompts.expert: Create a new coordinate system with Euler angles set to zero and translation vector also set to zero. On the first face, draw the first loop as a circle centered at coordinates (0.0119, 0.0119) with a radius of 0.0119. Draw the second loop as another circle centered at the same point but with a smaller radius of 0.0094. Apply a sketch scale factor of 0.0238 to the entire two-dimensional sketch. Rotate the scaled sketch using the same Euler angles and translate it using the same translation vector. Extrude the sketch 0.75 units along the normal direction to create a three-dimensional solid body. The final part is a vertical rod with a cylindrical section. The length and width of the rod are both 0.02383474576271186 units, and the height is 0.75 units.
prompts.all_level_data:
<level1>
Create a new coordinate system with Euler angles set to zero and translation vector also set to zero. On the first face, draw the first loop as a circle centered at coordinates (0.0119, 0.0119) with a radius of 0.0119. Draw the second loop as another circle centered at the same point but with a smaller radius of 0.0094. Apply a sketch scale factor of 0.0238 to the entire two-dimensional sketch. Rotate the scaled sketch using the same Euler angles and translate it using the same translation vector. Extrude the sketch 0.75 units along the normal direction to create a three-dimensional solid body. The final part is a vertical rod with a cylindrical section. The length and width of the rod are both 0.02383474576271186 units, and the height is 0.75 units.
</level1>

<level2>
The part consists of a vertical rod with a cylindrical section. The rod has a consistent cross-sectional shape throughout its length. The overall dimensions of the rod are defined by its height, which is 0.75 units, and its width and depth, both measuring approximately 0.0238 units. The cross-section of the rod features an outer circular boundary and an inner circular boundary, creating a hollow cylindrical shape. This design ensures structural integrity while reducing material usage.
</level2>

<level3>
The design features a vertical rod with a hollow cylindrical shape. The rod stands 0.75 units tall and has a consistent width and depth of about 0.0238 units. This simple yet effective design is ideal for applications requiring a lightweight and strong component.
</level3>
prompts.nli_data:
<part_1>
### Construct a Vertical Rod with a Cylindrical Section
#### Create a New Coordinate System
- Set Euler Angles to [0.0, 0.0, 0.0].
- Set Translation Vector to [0.0, 0.0, 0.0].

#### Draw a 2D Sketch
- **Face 1**
  - **Loop 1**
    - Draw a circle with a center at (0.0119, 0.0119) and a radius of 0.0119.
  - **Loop 2**
    - Draw a circle with a center at (0.0119, 0.0119) and a radius of 0.0094.

#### Scale the 2D Sketch
- Apply a sketch scale of 0.0238.

#### Transform the Scaled 2D Sketch into 3D
- Rotate the sketch using the Euler Angles [0.0, 0.0, 0.0].
- Translate the sketch using the Translation Vector [0.0, 0.0, 0.0].

#### Extrude the 2D Sketch to Generate the 3D Model
- Extrude the sketch 0.75 units towards the normal.
- Do not extrude in the opposite direction.
- The resulting shape will create a new solid body.

#### Description of the Part
- The part is a vertical rod with a cylindrical section.
- Length: 0.02383474576271186 units.
- Width: 0.02383474576271186 units.
- Height: 0.75 units.
</part_1>
